productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Blue Sweater
description: Composition Blue pullover made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with a hood and drawstrings, full raglan sleeves with a grey knitted band above the cuffs and a grey patch on the elbows, one pocket in the middle with asymmetric openings on either sides, grey knitted band above the hem and Big Ben logo embroidered on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Subtle and stylish, this blue pullover from united colors of benetton speaks volumes about your heightened sense of style. The branding on the chest enhances your fashion statement, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Layer this over a tee, with jeans and sports shoes Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo
